entities.name: AGROTECHNOLOGY TRANSFER
entities.description: The process of transferring agricultural technology from one place or country to another to improve productivity

entities.name: FOOD DEFICITS
entities.description: The lack of sufficient staple foods in developing countries

entities.name: SOIL DETERIORATION
entities.description: The degradation of soil quality resulting from excessive and unwise use

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL RESEARCH
entities.description: Scientific efforts aimed at solving agricultural problems and improving efficiency

entities.name: SIMULATION MODELS
entities.description: Tools that simulate biological processes to predict crop performance

entities.name: REGRESSION EQUATIONS
entities.description: Mathematical tools relating crop performance to input and site-factor variables

entities.name: CROP PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The measurable output or success of a crop in a given environment

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL SITE-FACTOR CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Environmental variables that limit the success of simulation and statistical methods

entities.name: ANALOGOUS TRANSFER
entities.description: A method of technology transfer based on the stratification of resource and environmental constraint variables

entities.name: SOIL SURVEY
entities.description: A method used to examine and map soil characteristics

entities.name: BENCHMARK SOILS CONCEPT
entities.description: A conceptual framework using representative soils to facilitate technology transfer

entities.name: SOIL SURVEY INTERPRETATION
entities.description: The process of applying soil survey data to agricultural planning

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL BENCHMARK SOILS NETWORK
entities.description: A global network of stations designed to facilitate technical communication and agrotechnology transfer

entities.name: AGRONOMIC RESEARCH
entities.description: Research focused on the science of soil management and crop production

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The strategic planning and improvement of agricultural systems

entities.name: DEVELOPING COUNTRIES
entities.description: Nations experiencing food deficits and requiring technology transfer

entities.name: DEVELOPED COUNTRIES
entities.description: Nations whose research assists the agrotechnology transfer process

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL AGRICULTURAL CENTERS
entities.description: Global institutions that support the transfer of agricultural technology
